homepage.heroSubline: Luxury iron doors, expertly installed and built to withstand the Texas climate. Elevate your home's security and curb appeal.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Houston's Entryways for Over a Decade
aboutText: Texas Luxury Iron Doors started with a simple vision: to bring unparalleled elegance and security to Houston homes. We're not just selling doors; we're crafting first impressions that last a lifetime.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous craftsmanship, durable materials, and personalized service. We understand the unique challenges Houston's climate presents, and our doors are built to endure.

We're deeply rooted in the Houston community, committed to providing top-quality iron doors to our neighbors in Sugar Land, Katy, and beyond. We stand behind our work and prioritize your satisfaction.

valueProps.title: Custom Designs
valueProps.description: From classic to contemporary, we create iron doors tailored to your specific style and architectural needs.

valueProps.title: Unmatched Security
valueProps.description: Our doors are built with robust materials and locking systems, providing superior protection for your home and family.

valueProps.title: Expert Installation
valueProps.description: Our experienced team ensures a seamless and secure installation, guaranteeing optimal performance and longevity.

valueProps.title: Weather Resistant
valueProps.description: Engineered to withstand Houston's harsh climate, our iron doors resist rust, corrosion, and warping.

homepage.ctaSubline: Request a free consultation and discover the perfect iron door for your Houston home.

services.name: Custom Iron Door Design
services.shortDescription: Design your dream iron door with our expert team.
services.description: We specialize in creating custom iron door designs that perfectly complement your home's architecture and reflect your personal style. Our design process begins with a detailed consultation to understand your vision and preferences. We then utilize advanced CAD software to create precise renderings, ensuring every detail is meticulously planned. From selecting the ironwork patterns to choosing the right finish, we guide you through every step of the process. We consider Houston's climate, recommending durable coatings and weather-resistant materials to ensure your custom door stands the test of time. Whether you're looking for a grand entrance or a subtle touch of elegance, our custom iron door designs will elevate your home's curb appeal and security.
process: Step 1: Initial Consultation - Discuss your design ideas and preferences.
Step 2: Design Creation - Our team creates detailed CAD renderings.
Step 3: Material Selection - Choose from a range of high-quality materials and finishes.
Step 4: Fabrication & Installation - Expert craftsmanship and professional installation.

faq.question: What is the typical lead time for a custom iron door?
faq.answer: The lead time varies depending on the complexity of the design, but it typically ranges from 8 to 12 weeks.

faq.question: Can I incorporate my own design ideas?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We encourage you to share your ideas and inspiration with our design team.

faq.question: Are your iron doors energy efficient?
faq.answer: Yes, our iron doors are designed with energy-efficient features, such as insulated glass and weather stripping, to minimize heat transfer.

services.name: Iron Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional iron door installation for lasting performance.
services.description: Proper installation is crucial for the performance and longevity of your iron door. Our experienced installation team ensures a seamless and secure fit, paying close attention to every detail. We begin by carefully removing your existing door and preparing the opening. We then meticulously install the new iron door, ensuring it is plumb, level, and properly aligned. Our team is trained to handle the unique challenges of Houston's diverse housing stock, from older ranch homes in the inner loop to newer constructions in the suburbs. We use high-quality hardware and weather stripping to create a tight seal, preventing drafts and water damage. With our professional installation services, you can rest assured that your iron door will provide years of reliable security and beauty.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment - Evaluate the existing door opening and prepare for installation.
Step 2: Door Removal - Carefully remove the old door and frame.
Step 3: Iron Door Installation - Precisely install the new iron door, ensuring proper alignment.
Step 4: Finishing Touches - Install hardware, weather stripping, and make any necessary adjustments.
benefits: Protection against drafts and water damage

faq.question: How long does iron door installation typically take?
faq.answer: The installation process usually takes between 4 to 8 hours, depending on the complexity of the project.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your installation services?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on our installation services to ensure your peace of mind.

faq.question: Will you dispose of my old door?
faq.answer: Yes, we will remove and dispose of your old door as part of our installation service.

services.name: Iron Door Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your iron door in top condition with our repair services.
services.description: Even the most durable iron doors require occasional maintenance and repairs. Our team provides comprehensive repair and maintenance services to keep your iron door in top condition. We handle everything from minor adjustments to major repairs, addressing issues such as rust, corrosion, damaged hardware, and misaligned frames. We understand the impact of Houston's humid climate on iron doors, and we use specialized techniques and coatings to protect against moisture damage. Our maintenance services include cleaning, lubricating hinges, and applying protective finishes to extend the life of your door. With our expert repair and maintenance services, you can ensure your iron door continues to provide security and beauty for years to come.
process: Step 1: Inspection - Thoroughly inspect the door for any signs of damage or wear.
Step 2: Repair - Address any issues, such as rust, corrosion, or damaged hardware.
Step 3: Maintenance - Clean, lubricate, and apply protective finishes.
Step 4: Final Check - Ensure the door is functioning properly and securely.

faq.question: How often should I have my iron door serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend having your iron door serviced annually to ensure it remains in optimal condition.

faq.question: What are the common signs that my iron door needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include rust, corrosion, difficulty opening or closing the door, and damaged hardware.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide emergency repair services for urgent issues that compromise your home's security.

services.name: Iron Door Painting & Finishing
services.shortDescription: Refresh your iron door with professional painting and finishing.
services.description: A fresh coat of paint or a new finish can dramatically enhance the appearance of your iron door. Our painting and finishing services revitalize your door, protecting it from the elements and restoring its beauty. We use high-quality paints and coatings specifically designed for iron, ensuring a durable and long-lasting finish. Our team carefully prepares the surface, removing any rust or old paint before applying the new coating. We offer a wide range of colors and finishes to match your home's style and personal preferences. Whether you want to maintain the classic look of your iron door or give it a modern makeover, our painting and finishing services will exceed your expectations. We understand Houston's intense sun and humidity, and we use UV-resistant coatings to prevent fading and cracking.
process: Step 1: Surface Preparation - Clean and prepare the door surface.
Step 2: Priming - Apply a high-quality primer.
Step 3: Painting - Apply the chosen paint or finish.
Step 4: Sealing - Seal the finish for added protection and durability.

faq.question: How long does the painting and finishing process take?
faq.answer: The process typically takes 2 to 3 days, depending on the size and complexity of the door.

faq.question: What types of paint and finishes do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of paints and finishes, including powder coating, enamel, and faux finishes.

faq.question: Is it necessary to prime the door before painting?
faq.answer: Yes, priming is essential for ensuring proper adhesion and a long-lasting finish.

services.name: Iron Gate Installation
services.shortDescription: Secure your property with custom iron gate installation.
services.description: Extend the elegance and security of iron to your property's perimeter with our custom iron gate installation services. We design and install iron gates to match your existing iron doors or to create a standalone statement. Our team handles every aspect of the installation process, from site preparation to gate automation. We offer a variety of gate styles, including swing gates, sliding gates, and pedestrian gates, all custom-built to your specifications. We understand the importance of security, and we use robust materials and locking systems to ensure your property is protected. Whether you're looking to enhance your home's curb appeal or improve security, our iron gate installation services will provide a lasting solution. We take into account Houston's frequent flooding, elevating gate mechanisms where appropriate.
process: Step 1: Site Survey and Design - Evaluate property and create gate design.
Step 2: Fabrication - Construct the iron gate to exact specifications.
Step 3: Installation - Professionally install the gate and automation system.
Step 4: Testing and Calibration - Ensure smooth and secure operation.

faq.question: Can you automate my iron gate?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a wide range of gate automation options, including remote control and keypad entry.

faq.question: What types of locking systems do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of locking systems, including electric strikes, magnetic locks, and mechanical locks.

faq.question: How long does iron gate installation typically take?
faq.answer: The installation process usually takes between 1 to 3 days, depending on the complexity of the project.

services.name: Commercial Iron Doors
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish iron doors for Houston businesses.
services.description: Texas Luxury Iron Doors provides commercial iron door solutions for businesses in Houston. We offer custom designs, durable construction, and professional installation. Our commercial iron doors provide enhanced security and a sophisticated look for your business. We can help you select the perfect iron door to complement your brand and building architecture. From small retail shops in The Heights to large office buildings in Midtown, we have a solution for you. We understand the importance of security for businesses, and our doors are built to withstand forced entry. We also offer maintenance and repair services to keep your commercial iron doors in top condition.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Design - Discuss your specific needs and design preferences.
Step 2: Manufacturing - Custom manufacture the iron door to meet your specifications.
Step 3: Installation - Professional installation by our experienced team.
Step 4: Maintenance - Ongoing maintenance and repair services.
benefits: Customized designs to match your brand

faq.question: Do you offer fire-rated iron doors?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide fire-rated iron doors for commercial applications.

serviceAreas.content:
TEXAS LUXURY IRON DOORS is proud to offer our custom iron door design, fabrication, and installation services to the residents of Sugar Land, Texas. Known for its master-planned communities that blossomed in the 1990s and 2000s, Sugar Land boasts beautiful homes that deserve equally stunning entryways. Our iron doors add a touch of elegance and security, perfectly complementing the established aesthetic of this vibrant city. We understand the unique architectural styles prevalent in Sugar Land and can create custom designs to match your home's individual character.

We’re committed to providing Sugar Land homeowners with exceptional craftsmanship and unparalleled customer service. From initial design consultation to final installation, our team will work closely with you to ensure your complete satisfaction. We understand the challenges posed by the hot, humid summers in Sugar Land. That's why our iron doors are built to withstand the elements, providing lasting beauty and security for years to come. We use high-quality materials and expert techniques to ensure your iron door will be a valuable addition to your home.
serviceAreas.localContext: Sugar Land, Texas, is a large suburban city known for its 1990s and 2000s master-planned communities and enduring appeal.

serviceAreas.content:

reviews.name: John S.
reviews.text: Texas Luxury Iron Doors exceeded my expectations! The custom design process was easy, and the installation was flawless. My new iron door has completely transformed the look of my home. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: My iron door was starting to rust and looked terrible. Texas Luxury Iron Doors repaired it quickly and professionally. It looks brand new again! Very happy with their service.

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: The iron gate installation was well done. There was a minor hiccup with the automated system, but they came back and fixed it promptly. Overall, a great experience.

reviews.name: Susan K.
reviews.text: I wanted to update the look of my iron door, and Texas Luxury Iron Doors did an amazing job. The new finish is beautiful, and it really makes my entryway stand out. The technician was very professional and meticulous.

reviews.name: David M.
reviews.text: We needed a secure and stylish entrance for our new office building, and Texas Luxury Iron Doors delivered. The commercial iron door is exactly what we wanted, and the installation was quick and efficient. Great job!

reviews.name: Jennifer A.
reviews.text: From design to install, an outstanding company. They really listened to my vision, and the final product is stunning. Worth every penny!
